label: Over water
description: Track pieces at or above the water surface.
impact: Base proximity score: up to 60 pieces at 0.666656 each.

label: Skimming water
description: Track pieces exactly at the water surface.
impact: Base proximity score: up to 22 pieces at 2.272720 each. Stacks with 'Over water'.

label: 1 unit above water
description: Track pieces exactly 1 build height unit (5 ft) above the water surface.
impact: Base proximity score: up to 10 pieces at 2.0 each. Stacks with 'Over water'.

label: 8+ units above water
description: Track pieces at least 8 build height units (40 ft) above the water surface.
impact: Base proximity score: up to 40 pieces at 0.625 each. Stacks with 'Over water'.

label: Touching ground
description: Track pieces whose bottom is exactly at ground level.
impact: Base proximity score: up to 70 pieces at 1.714279 each.

label: Cliff/trench wall alongside
description: Raised land or trench walls to the left or right of the track that rise above the track's clearance height.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 10, 20) at 2.5 each.

label: Track over queue
description: Queue path pieces below the track.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 8, 12) at 6.25 each. Huge seeded bonus.

label: Queue touching track bottom
description: A one-time boost for a queue path piece below the track with zero gap between the clearance height of the queue path and the base of the track.
impact: Adds a one-time 40 proximity score if present anywhere.

label: Queue touching track top
description: A one-time boost for a queue path piece above the track with zero gap between the base of the queue path and the clearance height of the track.
impact: Adds a one-time 45 proximity score if present anywhere.

label: Path touching track bottom
description: Path below the track with zero gap between the clearance height of the path and the base of the track.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 10, 20) at 3.75 each.

label: Path touching track top
description: Path above the track with zero gap between the base of the path and the clearance height of the track.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 10, 20) at 4.25 each.

label: Path alongside
description: Path to the left or right of the track that's within 1 build height unit (5ft) of the track's height.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 10, 20) at 1.75 each.

label: Path through loop
description: Path pieces going through the ride's vertical loop.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 4, 6) at 15.0 each.

label: Station-area scenery
description: Scenery pieces around the first station. If the station is underground the score is fixed at 40 and scenery isn't counted.
impact: Staction-area scenery boost contribution applied to excitement.

label: Side scenery below track
description: Scenery that's one tile to the left or right of the track, the top of which is below the track's height.
impact: Base proximity score: up to 35 side-adjacent scenery pieces at 1.428558 each.

label: Side scenery overlapping track
description: Scenery that's one tile to the left or right of the track, the top of which is within the track's clearance area.
impact: Base proximity score: up to 35 side-adjacent scenery pieces at 0.857132 each.

label: Other ride crosses track
description: Another ride's track is above or below the track, regardless of if its touching or a near-miss.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 10, 15) at 2.666656 each.

label: Other ride touching above or below
description: Another ride's track is above or below the track with zero gap.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 10, 15) at 4.666656 each.

label: Other ride near-miss
description: Another ride's track passes over or under the track within a 1 to 5 build height unit gap (5-25ft).
impact: Base proximity score: up to 5 pieces at 9.0 each.

label: Other ride goes alongside
description: Another ride's track is on the tile to the left or right within 1 build height unit (5ft).
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 10, 20) at 2.25 each.

label: Other ride goes through loop
description: Another ride's track passes through the ride's vertical loop window at 90 degrees.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 4, 6) at 20.0 each.

label: Passing through a loop
description: Ride's track passes through another ride's vertical loop.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 4, 6) at 10.0 each.

label: Intersecting loops
description: A one time boost for when the ride's vertical loop intersects another ride's vertical loop at 90 degrees.
impact: Adds a one-time 100 proximity score if present anywhere.

label: Own track touching
description: Ride passes over or under itself with zero vertical gap.
impact: Base proximity score: min(raw + 10, 15) at 3.333328 each.

label: Own track near-miss
description: Ride passes over or under itself within a 1 to 5 build height unit gap (5-25ft).
impact: Base proximity score: up to 5 pieces at 6.0 each.

label: Over own station
description: A one-time boost when a ride passes directly over its own station with zero gap.
impact: Adds a one-time 55 proximity score if present anywhere.

label: Near-miss own station
description: A one-time boost when a ride passes over or under its own station with a 1 to 5 build height unit gap (5-25ft).
impact: Adds a one-time 25 proximity score if present anywhere.
